name: Chutney Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the hard cooked eggs.
2. Add the cream cheese to the mashed eggs and mash everything together until well combined.
3. Stir in the Worcestershire sauce, curry powder, Cayenne pepper, Tabasco sauce, celery seeds, mayonnaise, salt, and black pepper.
4. Fold in the chopped chutney last.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and chill until ready to serve.
6. This dip can be stored in the refrigerator for several weeks.
